scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names iam,tenant,config,audit,portal,gateway --prefix-colors blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,green "npm run start:dev -w @sme/iam-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/tenant-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/config-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/audit-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/portal-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/api-gateway"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently --names web-admin,web-portal --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web-admin" "npm run dev:web-portal"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names iam,tenant,config,audit,portal,gateway,web-admin,web-portal --prefix-colors blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,green,red,gray "npm run start:dev -w @sme/iam-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/tenant-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/config-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/audit-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/portal-service" "npm run start:dev -w @sme/api-gateway" "npm run dev:web-admin" "npm run dev:web-portal"
scripts.prisma:push:iam: dotenv -e apps/iam-service/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema=apps/iam-service/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss --skip-generate
scripts.prisma:push:audit: dotenv -e apps/audit-service/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema=apps/audit-service/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss --skip-generate
scripts.prisma:push:tenant: dotenv -e apps/tenant-service/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema=apps/tenant-service/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss --skip-generate
scripts.prisma:push:config: dotenv -e apps/config-service/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema=apps/config-service/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss --skip-generate
scripts.prisma:push:portal: dotenv -e apps/portal-service/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema=apps/portal-service/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss --skip-generate
scripts.prisma:generate:all: npx prisma generate --schema=apps/iam-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/audit-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/tenant-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/config-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/portal-service/prisma/schema.prisma
